statement: In every magma, Equation 2762 (`x = ((y * y) * (z * z)) * y`) implies Equation 4044 (`x * y = (z * (w * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0486
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op z z)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op w y)) x)
